description: an alias phrase resolves to a single account
assertions: resolved is non-null and its account_id is the Hearthline record
resolution basis is exact, alias, or substring (a confident single match)

description: two brands sharing a prefix resolve to null with both surfaced
assertions: resolved is null (never auto-picks between close candidates)
candidates lists both the Hearthline and Hearthstone records
a gap tells the caller to ask the human which brand

description: a category or nickname phrase never auto-resolves
assertions: the lighting-category brand appears in candidates at low confidence

description: an unknown brand yields no candidates and a gap, never a fabricated account

input.query: some brand we never talked to

assertions: resolved is null and candidates is empty
a gap asks the human to name the brand exactly
